featureName: BUG-073-003: Cross-language renderer canary CI toolchain gating (skip-on-absence, fail-loud-on-drift, dedicated CI job)

scopeProgress.title: Toolchain-gate the canary (skip on absence, fail-loud on drift) and keep it running in CI

lockdownState.reason: bugfix-fastlane single-scope CI/test-infrastructure fix; done-certification deferred (product-E2E/stress/scenario-manifest gates inapplicable)

observations.summary: Greening lint-and-test unblocked the CI pipeline past the long-failing canary, surfacing a PRE-EXISTING backlog of integration failures (tests/integration cli_auth_passthrough_test.go TestCLIAuthPassthrough_NoArgsExitsTwo / _UnknownSubcommandExitsTwo expected exit 2 got 1; tests/integration/assistant TestLocationNormalizeIntegration_OpenMeteoCanonicalLocations; tests/integration/{api,mobile,openknowledge}). This changeset touches zero integration / CLI-auth files; not caused by this fix and out of scope for BUG-073-003.
observations.followUpAction: File separate bug(s) for the pre-existing integration-suite failures now surfaced on main.

observations.summary: E2E UI workflow is RED on main with PRE-EXISTING spec-083 card-rewards Playwright failures (cardrewards_wallet.spec.ts / cardrewards_rotating_verify.spec.ts: /v1/web/login got 429). E2E UI conclusion=failure on the last 6 main SHAs including parent 784a11b1 and report-SHA 20b2dafa, i.e. red BEFORE this push. spec-083 is operator WIP explicitly excluded from this change.
observations.followUpAction: Resolve the spec-083 card-rewards e2e-ui /v1/web/login 429 failures in the spec-083 WIP.
